name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I hate to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hey there -- I'm running between meetings (on top of Trump's visit, we've got a big finance deadline coming up this weekend, and it's keeping us pretty busy) and wanted to write you a quick little note. In just three days, President Trump will touch down in Colorado to host yet another exclusive fundraiser for my opponent. According to my finance team, this lavish dinner is expected to bring in _hundreds of thousands of dollars from big money donors desperate to derail our campaign._ I've always depended on people like you chipping in a few hard-earned dollars at a time to keep our campaign going strong. But with Trump's looming visit on Friday and our mid-month deadline on Sunday, I hate to say that we might actually fall short of our critical $250,000 goal. **Can I count on you to pitch in a donation of whatever you can afford before Trump lands in Colorado? I promise no donation is too small in a moment like this. name: Mark Warner
subject: demanding better from our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek,

I want a President who believes in science. I want a President who knows when it's time to listen to the experts, and who shows faith in the career public servants who keep our country safe. More than anything, I want a President who is up to the task of running the federal government, whether in good times or moments of crisis.

Unfortunately, instead of leadership and stability, the President's management of the federal government in recent weeks has produced chaos and confusion. The administration's disjointed response to the coronavirus -- from contradicting public health officials to the fumbling of coronavirus test kits -- are particularly alarming. So, too, is the President's culture of dismissing anyone he perceives as disagreeing with him and appointing unqualified leaders in their place. He's putting personal loyalty over our security, plain and simple. This is especially concerning as we head into an election year where our adversaries will be trying everything they can to shake Americans' faith in our democratic system.

I know that America is resilient, and we will get through this, even under the dangerously inadequate leadership we've seen from this President. But the next four years are a different matter. The President's erratic responses to critical national security and public health challenges remind us of what's at stake in November. The truth is, we must defeat Donald Trump and flip the Senate because the future of our country depends on it.

As we look toward November, it's critical that Democrats here in Virginia keep putting in the hard work to counteract the money and volunteers that the Trump campaign is already pouring into the Commonwealth. Record turnout for the primary proved that Democrats are ready and willing to act -- we've got to keep that momentum going.

We have the chance to elect a President who will rise to the challenges we face and lead our country based on what's best for the American people, not what's best for Donald Trump. And if we flip the Senate in November, we will have the opportunity to make real change that will truly turn our country around.

I hope you will join me in demanding better from our government in these trying times and commit to being a part of this campaign. I'm so grateful for your ongoing support and look forward to working alongside you to make change happen this November.

Sincerely,
Mark Warner
---
|
---

subject: [The Oregonizer] We're All in This Together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
We are all watching the developing situation with COVID -19 very closely. As a mom, you can be sure I am paying attention, and taking steps to keep my family healthy and safe - as well as advocating for public health measures to keep all families healthy | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.300/hfduA4O1SHyxulURNGtnMQ/h0/Y-2FgbIxpjl7vCXwYlxcWe74cJIRNk1BsdXc03JixbMX3KgWMCbbSCydC3bZxBc1tJx4r5FFv8Wllz735lRuDeCmAwxwkAfShpRlP5tnp0yM9xAPq2J5tnxYYCWrjsMMQ7p229fI1sHOnhcBi2j4cLJgGhA-2FUjNFPVG2JgWXoumadiObRQsZACuX7vH2WPuNmhEq-2BQYynm9T8LA5dWVO-2BhIID66KBD9Lh6WjCO-2BwEH9LELgqqt31Esqv3NAZ-2BID4swlNfdl-2F-2BAL-2B1s-2FlvcMbETtmUVAiXIUrhOBPdjahWDOggWA3eRyeJ97JsbPOxkLnA-2BiFaG6XHxknSBRI532b0A0nmJ5KdQi6SXnADgcb6D-2Ftg-3D/MMjO)
---
|
---
Dear supporters, We are all watching the developing situation with COVID -19 very closely. As a mom, you can be sure I am paying attention, and taking steps to keep my family healthy and safe - as well as advocating for public health measures to keep _all_ families healthy and safe. I am dismayed by the reckless response from the occupant of the White House, and the rumblings of a major bailout for the airlines, cruise ship, and shale gas corporations while 60 million Americans are uninsured or underinsured in the midst of a global pandemic -- and tens of millions more face lost wages that could sink their household in the next month if they get sick or must miss work. I am thinking about our seniors, and those with underlying health conditions, who are the most at risk for serious complications. I am thinking about our frontline healthcare providers, nurses, technicians and hospital staff who are working around the clock and often in less-than-safe conditions. I am thinking about people who are living in ICE detention, incarcerated, in crowded homeless shelters, or on the streets without access to basics like soap and hot water. And I am thinking about our own campaign community of volunteers and how we can continue our fight for Medicare for All, universal paid sick time, and paid family leave -- which are more important now than ever! If this crisis teaches us anything, it is that we are truly all in this together. This virus doesn't discriminate -- it crosses borders and boundaries, and it crosses class and race and gender and age. We are reminded that what happens on the other side of the world, matters to us personally; what happens to the most vulnerable among us, directly effects our lives. We are, to paraphrase Dr. King, "tied in a single garment of destiny." It is with this understanding, that we continue our campaign more determined than ever, building our movement to "fight for someone you don't know." We have had several events this week canceled due to corona virus concerns. We are working hard to adapt and adjust in real time, and our priority right now is to keep our community safe, and to raise the funds to expand our online organizing and texting programs. In order to reach voters who will be staying home, especially our students who have been given a three week spring break, outreach via social media and peer-to-peer texting becomes even more essential in this period. Help us keep up the fight by chipping in to our fund to expand our digital organizing and continue to lead with a progressive vision of universal healthcare. Be kind, be safe, and take care of one another. Onward, Doyle
---

clean_body: We are all watching the developing situation with COVID -19 very closely. As a mom, you can be sure I am paying attention, and taking steps to keep my family healthy and safe - as well as advocating for public health measures to keep all families healthy | | | | | Dear supporters, We are all watching the developing situation with COVID -19 very closely. As a mom, you can be sure I am paying attention, and taking steps to keep my family healthy and safe - as well as advocating for public health measures to keep all families healthy and safe. I am dismayed by the reckless response from the occupant of the White House, and the rumblings of a major bailout for the airlines, cruise ship, and shale gas corporations while 60 million Americans are uninsured or underinsured in the midst of a global pandemic -- and tens of millions more face lost wages that could sink their household in the next month if they get sick or must miss work. I am thinking about our seniors, and those with underlying health conditions, who are the most at risk for serious complications. I am thinking about our frontline healthcare providers, nurses, technicians and hospital staff who are working around the clock and often in less-than-safe conditions. I am thinking about people who are living in ICE detention, incarcerated, in crowded homeless shelters, or on the streets without access to basics like soap and hot water. And I am thinking about our own campaign community of volunteers and how we can continue our fight for Medicare for All, universal paid sick time, and paid family leave -- which are more important now than ever! If this crisis teaches us anything, it is that we are truly all in this together. This virus doesn't discriminate -- it crosses borders and boundaries, and it crosses class and race and gender and age. We are reminded that what happens on the other side of the world, matters to us personally; what happens to the most vulnerable among us, directly effects our lives. We are, to paraphrase Dr. King, "tied in a single garment of destiny." It is with this understanding, that we continue our campaign more determined than ever, building our movement to "fight for someone you don't know." We have had several events this week canceled due to corona virus concerns. We are working hard to adapt and adjust in real time, and our priority right now is to keep our community safe, and to raise the funds to expand our online organizing and texting programs. In order to reach voters who will be staying home, especially our students who have been given a three week spring break, outreach via social media and peer-to-peer texting becomes even more essential in this period. Help us keep up the fight by chipping in to our fund to expand our digital organizing and continue to lead with a progressive vision of universal healthcare. Be kind, be safe, and take care of one another. Onward, Doyle ?linkid=5&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-oregonizer-oregons-delegates-are-now-in-play&emailreferrer=email746011_from1000812&email_subject=the-oregonizer-were-all-in-this-together | | ENDORSEMENT ALERT | "Doyle. Canning is a vocal advocate against the Jordan Cove pipeline, a potential environmentally devastating natural gas project stretching across Southern Oregon, ending in Coos Bay. Her passionate opposition to this project, which abuses the power of eminent domain by taking land from Oregonians to the benefit of a Canadian Company in order to ship natural gas to Asia, and her commitment to address the looming climate crisis were key factors in many Members' decisions." | Shaun King: Bernie 2020 surrogate and criminal justice reform advocate. | Naomi Klein: Author, climate activist, filmmaker and Bernie 2020 surrogate. | JoshFox: Film director, anti-fracking crusader, Bernie 2020 surrogate. | Erika Andiola: Immigrant rights activist and former press secretary for Latinx outreach for Bernie 2016, who said, "I encourage my Oregon friends to support your campaign. I hope to see more candidates and progressive leaders like you support this crucial plan to change the course on immigration." | ANNOUNCEMENTS | CANVASSING IN ALBANY We will be hosting our first ever canvass in Albany on Saturday, March 21st! Starting location is still being determined, but we will be leaving at 12pm! Don't forget your walking shoes and a friend! | CANDIDATES FORUM IN ROSEBURG The Douglas County Democrats will be hosting a candidates forum on Sunday, March 29th at the Douglas County Fair Grounds. Come support and hear from rural Oregonians! | TIMBER / FORESTRY ROUND TABLE The Canning For Congress campaign is putting together a round table regarding the timber industry, forest policy, and what Doyle can do in Congress to fight for change. If you would be interested in participating, email kelly@canningforcongress.com | UPCOMING EVENTS VOTER REGISTRATION AT UO This Thursday at 5pm, we will be registering voters before the term is over! - SATURDAY CANVASSING EUGENE There will be a group leaving from the campaign HQ at 10am to hit the doors around Eugene and spread the word about Doyle! SATURDAY CANVASS IN CORVALLIS Join our growing network of supporters by canvassing weekly in Corvallis! Bring your walking shoes and your friends! SATURDAY CANVASS IN JUNCTION CITY Join volunteers leaving from Laurel Park in Junction City! We will be knocking doors and spreading the word about Doyle's campaign! | YES WE CAN... | DOYLE STANDS WITH MIGRANT JUSTICE PLATFORM Doyle also came out this week with her support of the Migrant Justice Platform, and their plan to transform immigration policy with concrete congressional actions to protect human rights, keep families together, ensure dignity and respect on the job. #Don'tLookAway #NoKidsinCages | HAPPY INTERNATIONAL WOMEN'S DAY! As the first woman EVER running for congress in Oregon's 4th congressional district, this was a special International women's day. We hope this campaign will be inspiring to the female leaders of the future. | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Our Coronavirus Challenge
body:
A time for working together. No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-j/)
Coronavirus (COVID-19) is on everyone's mind. In fact, the first three cases of Coronavirus have been confirmed in Ohio. In this week's blog I discuss this ongoing challenge, what steps have been taken from the executive and legislative level, and finally offer some words of hope and encouragement. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [My Take on Super Tuesday](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-d/)
Yesterday was Super Tuesday. 14 states across the country held their primaries, and one territory, American Samoa. The results were pretty interesting. Joe Biden, who looked like his campaign was on life-support, won BIG. And the press dutifully changed their tone. Joe is now the comeback kid! [Read more >](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-h/) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [Bernie and Fidel](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-o/)
In the course of his political career, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the presidency, Bernie Sanders has had many wacky points of view. In this week's blog, I'll focus on one - Bernie's admiration of the communist dictator, Fidel Castro. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [A Bloomberg - Hillary Ticket?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-p/)
I first heard the story over the weekend that Mike Bloomberg might be considering Hillary Clinton as a vice presidential running mate. Like me, maybe this caught you by surprise? In this week's blog I write about how likely we could see a Bloomberg - Hillary Democrat ticket. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhikfit-kujkulhluu-z/)

clean_body: Statehouse Republicans took every opportunity to cut deals for special interests that dumped cash into their campaign accounts. | | | | ---|--- | | = As the legislative session comes to a close, one thing is undeniable: special interests were crowned the big winner. The GOP's loyalty lies with campaign donors, not Hoosiers. = Statehouse Republicans took every opportunity to cut deals for special interests who dumped cash into their campaign accounts. They did nothing to demonstrably lower health care costs, gutted proposals to address maternal mortality, and failed to give Hoosier educators a much-deserved raise. The message is clear: if you line their pockets with campaign cash, then you have a friend in the GOP. But if you're like the majority of working Hoosiers, then don't expect a bigger paycheck or smaller health care bills. = The good news is we don't have to put up with this much longer. In 2020, we can get rid of the GOP supermajority for good. But we can't do that without your help. Peter, = Every dollar you give goes toward building the bench, knocking doors, and mobilizing voters so that we can win big in 2020. Let's make 2020, the year we elected officials that work for us. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = = = Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Jason Yates
subject: Quick update
body:
Peter,
The primary election season is well underway. And it’s not just presidential candidates on the ballot, but also critical primary races for congressional seats, state representatives, judicial, and municipal offices.
**There are more than 100,000 elections taking place across the country this year.**
At My Faith Votes, we are proud to offer ballot information on _every election_ in the nation at our online Voting Assistance Center and provide voting reminders for every election with the virtual Personal Voting Assistant.
Because of faithful My Faith Votes supporters, we’ve been able to share our resources with an extraordinary number of people. Already this year, more people have used our voting tools than in all of 2018.
**That’s ten times as many believers utilizing the Personal Voting Assistant than we had during the midterm elections!**
When you support My Faith Votes, you make this possible. You fund the tools and information that turn Christians out to the polls to protect biblical values including human life, religious freedom, the rule of law, and marriage and family.
But for every new person we equip, it costs money to offer registration and absentee ballot assistance, send voting reminders, offer biblical insight on the voting issues, and maintain the technology to meet voter’s needs.
**[Will you donate to our efforts to equip more non-voting Christians before November](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200312apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200312apl01nd&n=1).**
Every dollar you give allows us to activate more people of faith to vote. With 90-million Christians in America, we have tremendous opportunity to live out Jeremiah 29:7 and seek the peace and welfare of our cities and our nation - but only _IF_ Christians vote!
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200312apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200312apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200312apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200312apl01nd&n=4).

| | It's a tough race, but we can do this Look, I won't lie to you, friends. **This is a tough race.** We're going up against one of Trump's favorite Republicans. Someone who's fought against the interests of working people like you and me for decades. Someone who's beloved by the elite Republican establishment and who feels entitled to winning this district. But for every reason this race is tough, there are even more reasons why I can win. [**With your support, I WILL beat Steve Chabot and finally represent the working-class families that are the backbone of our community. **I 'm a fighter.** I flew 200+ combat missions for the U.S. Air Force and led most of them. I know how to lead this campaign and keep us focused on our mission even when things look tough.
**I 'm a builder.** My immigrant parents taught me to dream big and work hard. I've always been committed to building community, whether that be volunteering in church or helping veterans find meaningful jobs.
**I 'm a listener. **I share a lot of life experiences with the great people of this district, and I've learned that everyone has an important story to share. Representing my constituents will be the honor of a lifetime, and I'll do everything I can to hear from them as often as possible.
So yes, that's right, this is a tough race. But I'm up for the challenge. [**All I need is your support:**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce67/30a4f917/50b7eb2a/28cd7b9e/4091495264/VEsP/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkfmonthlymarch?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200312_WhyICanWin_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+All+I+need+is+your+support&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200312_WhyICanWin_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200312_WhyICanWin_U2_X1")

Thank you,
Nikki

clean_body: | "" | | It's a tough race, but we can do this Look, I won't lie to you, friends. This is a tough race. We're going up against one of Trump's favorite Republicans. Someone who's fought against the interests of working people like you and me for decades. Someone who's beloved by the elite Republican establishment and who feels entitled to winning this district. But for every reason this race is tough, there are even more reasons why I can win. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" I 'm a fighter. I flew 200+ combat missions for the U.S. Air Force and led most of them. I know how to lead this campaign and keep us focused on our mission even when things look tough. I 'm a builder. My immigrant parents taught me to dream big and work hard. I've always been committed to building community, whether that be volunteering in church or helping veterans find meaningful jobs. I 'm a listener. I share a lot of life experiences with the great people of this district, and I've learned that everyone has an important story to share. Representing my constituents will be the honor of a lifetime, and I'll do everything I can to hear from them as often as possible. So yes, that's right, this is a tough race. But I'm up for the challenge. "" | | "" Thank you, Nikki | | Nikki Foster is a US Air Force veteran, a working mom, and a Democrat running for Congress in Ohio's 1st congressional district. name: Team Messner
subject: MEMO: Fundraising and the State of the Race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ed1d145aa1399a25/747c1afb4cc9d622c3d6b838967d376c/33153) To: Team Messner From: Michael Biundo, RightVoter
Re: Fundraising and the State of the Race
Date: March 11, 2020 | |
---
I recently joined Corky’s campaign because it has become obvious to me and my team that he has what it takes to beat Senator Shaheen.

Corky has done over 250 events/meetings. He has been endorsed by many top level Republicans, and has assembled a great team. He is running a complete campaign. With less than three weeks to go in the fundraising quarter, I wanted to provide a brief analysis of where we stand on fundraising and how it will affect both the primary and general election moving forward.

_**Corky Messner is putting an additional $2 million into the race this quarter**_.

The reasons for this investment are outlined below.
**1\. New Hampshire Republicans must nominate a strong, well-funded candidate for Senate**.

New Hampshire is a Presidential battleground state and a rare opportunity for a Senate pickup in 2020.
* In 2016, Trump lost New Hampshire by only 2,736 votes (0.37%); and Sen. Kelly Ayotte lost by only 1,017 votes (0.14%).
* In 2014, Sen. Jeanne Shaheen won by 15,847 votes (3.3%).

**2. The Republican nominee must have general election resources now**.

It will not be enough for a Republican Senate candidate to count on quickly ramping up fundraising for the general election after the primary.
* Senator Jeanne Shaheen currently has $5,750,000 cash on hand.
* New Hampshire’s primary is September 8 – just eight weeks before the general election.

If the Republican nominee is not able to be on television and in mailboxes within days of securing the nomination, Shaheen and the Democrats will have a window of opportunity to define the Republican nominee in highly unfavorable terms.
**3. Only Corky Messner is in a position to defeat Jeanne Shaheen**.

As of December 31, 2019, Corky Messner had a cash-on-hand of $1,067,843, rapidly outpacing his primary opponents Don Bolduc ($114,136) and Bill O’Brien ($46,494.)

(Corky Messner had total receipts of $1,480,906 in 2019, $268,786 from individual donors and $1,210,000 in candidate contributions.)
**With the additional $2 million, Corky Messner will end Q1 somewhere around 10x the cash-on-hand advantage versus his Republican rivals. He is the only Republican prepared to defeat Jeanne Shaheen in November and is by far the best person to be on the ballot with Governor Chris Sununu and President Donald Trump.**
[ MAKE A SECURE CONTRIBUTION HERE >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ed1d145aa1399a25/1131d8a8bc1d280dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:

| | | Friend,

I'm on the road today in Yates Center, Iola, and Ft. Scott, but I wanted to send you a quick update! We continue to travel throughout the district **(see photos below)** , and we will continue to keep up the pace.

It is completely worth it when we get to meet with folks from the grassroots of the Party and hear the commitment they have to keeping our state Red in November. Thank you for caring about the future of Kansas.

In the past week, we have been to **Paola, Garnett, Mound City, Louisburg, Chanute, Fredonia, and Neodesha. **Keep up to date on where we are, and where we are headed next, by following us on [Facebook](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=284f4242e1&e=1050d051da).

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Changing plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Unfortunately, our district has been hit by the coronavirus. I’ve been speaking with our Field Director, Matt, and we’re going to have to make some adjustments to the way we campaign. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AQE/ni0YAA/t.300/1zXf2flTTpmW5n6xl4E7MA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJiXG-2FNFtAG6J2VX7uCG-2BvLOjLp58evr6w91cZBSP3C6zm6hiAZem6u-2BfAx0l3xHAqXbk8B3nrZBB7esUvf7RyF9cBL-2FBN3Z-2FqNHVwnPMoIMMLWI4PukyOPdM5v5QqrPhBLeu2BqMawPISUkFPrILOp-2B6gi22YgbKUW0woa6qnhR44rONgDlOzw-2FqbAK-2BTOfRmxUMoogoQ5smuPdEvzCvUrss35PtXQRdJZ37Pnk-2BVrKw-3D-3D/jy4K) Friend, **** **** **** Unfortunately, our district has been hit by the coronavirus. I’ve been speaking with our Field Director, Matt, and we’re going to have to make some adjustments to the way we campaign. With events being cancelled and door-to-door canvassing being limited due to the coronavirus outbreak, we need to find other ways to reach voters.
Since we won’t be able to connect with voters in person as much as we’d like, we will need to expand our phone-banking and text-banking efforts. Can we count on you to help out? **_[Please click here to sign up to phone-bank or text-bank and we can get you set up to start reaching out to voters in the district.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AQE/ni0YAA/t.300/1zXf2flTTpmW5n6xl4E7MA/h1/I3pn4SJUQx-2BiuYuahoeeGmtR0sW5RNY3gtdFFLnTJRaIROiqz4S4ickqanh12D9Hy-2BYbYhEfh5Uq9qVFPmPXFOXC2iSLkEwaXGqa6p-2Bz3pkOx0JK2Kh38-2Bw-2BrgkSkF8HsGMu2Iw7Cs7J4PqaPAJl8b28KG3XaHeQwsAuQ16nQTFzIgh28ydhqzNLodvSgtvEgEaFpS293pV0B3L6A6Wd4Ut8E7XHRM3PnLsFFohyZDo11-2BzhhKMKF0j4dvp7tp2k/65IW)_** It’s super easy and can be done in the comfort of your own home.
Unfortunately, these programs aren’t free. And now it looks like we will need to send more texts than we had budgeted for and invest in a new dialer to make more calls. **_[Will you make a contribution to help us adjust our strategy so we can continue reaching voters?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AQE/ni0YAA/t.300/1zXf2flTTpmW5n6xl4E7MA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJiXG-2FNFtAG6J2VX7uCG-2BvLOjLp58evr6w91cZBSP3C60d9cwffYA2hN7UvPoPXVmEeadD3oBHgdcQqpqWFK9ncjzC68c-2Faw5XxMP7dcPb9ylgci73qe59l-2FEW50vDwy-2BBOVcb7j5xvkK9Sdo-2BDlU72Q76eKplgyPN8y2yC3G1x5DggoIrvhen49vN-2BF3kGQEHuJFYsb2MZSo7vBfKgGwdg4c-2BZRGCQbHXcrAEdcbBL7Q-3D-3D/YRZf)_**
[Help us fund our text and call program](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AQE/ni0YAA/t.300/1zXf2flTTpmW5n6xl4E7MA/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJiXG-2FNFtAG6J2VX7uCG-2BvLOjLp58evr6w91cZBSP3C6-2Fd5wtA11AfqBnLCC1ah7qGsfvGl4-2F92XOXHa9Ki5o6Lu9dJPq4Joul14-2BALXx7xDa1bv73hLPlmJTmnkPIVnRA8BhlsnWhjvNWXLsUXHvtejW5FPH1JT746VRme8-2B7wrLEHWJR5KnfG9JRI3uXzwr7Xv156grMyo-2FN8DTk-2FQsqxijDBoWxR3YMbaeLzJiPpaw-3D-3D/dIRK)
Thank you,
Mondaire
[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AQE/ni0YAA/t.300/1zXf2flTTpmW5n6xl4E7MA/h4/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8AsJlRvyv3gSneUqeLKLznBCoz42UjHRg-2F9mAL1dFJ3ZZLzZdRYOoh1hLqB5rZpfXyI4EkxoaQB080Jhl9QnHjnfe9T8DIxH8PIkL33ehvktO4ngq1Zv1SsNf7eT1kZRc16tb6HJNpqBYM1eE9mh8xDHtvpBs5FAd-2FOfH0XcEFg-2F7-2B9s-2BgcxAtYO4crPDiMbNuJsZxvpcDu5mIhnTkdZdDkJ8EVeirnTHsWYWNhDXedD/Uuqu) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AQE/ni0YAA/t.300/1zXf2flTTpmW5n6xl4E7MA/h5/tX6tdXlLuYnKkE2jZWciQUs1NelnZQ77h2lAz4D56MKHwSUyZQWx7qVCjFcDqaloBuebbm3HJ0d-2B5-2FYxxdoKwVOBabDdnsV2tGcSjbvcxR3iGs-2FVigfjuW4-2BoeO2bq4jAPViAyGWByKkOslra1dZHW8woYa3-2BSb3HZZj9-2BlZGvYd7dYCC1WTnWGGxz6l96DSOesOyjnOGT6CY-2BPKo65wWI-2BuXB22tXWlhYGbxXa-2BmXY-3D/gCsC) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AQE/ni0YAA/t.300/1zXf2flTTpmW5n6xl4E7MA/h6/UgaStWBIiLYn8eevue7q8FAhcGqAoYLOwsOn0RlPD886rRcJZIsaAG91B3gZr9Se0rl7E6sVthVxyzbEXp-2Fbn-2FhHir0O0SxILqgq5UTDTiOwN9khP7lVnMRY8rHf6luLrklBlY40A5FQEi1LXPqfS0VH8Xwc2I3aPVj93eRwowHPAO-2FM-2BWF2a4NUMj5SFXuknFljGgOTSKnluEIFlbXkPsyl0ikv8NbuC9fcS9BhpG98c-2Bij8qFv1WMqrF0Zixrq/FTxZ)

name: David Hill
subject: Why I Am Running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | [](http://links
body:
I know that CD-5 deserves better than Kendra Horn. I know that CD-5 deserves better than Kendra Horn. The New Democrat Party’s platform is not new policy; it’s a replication of socialism that has failed in countries around the world time and again. China, Russia, Cuba, and so many others have instituted socialist policies at one point in their histories, and each time, socialism failed their citizens with empty promises and devastating consequences. This year, we have the opportunity to **_send the socialists packing_**. I am asking you to help us send them home by donating to Team Hill today. [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=6a2741bc461443c38a12aed0a7f2925a&_e=9CY_1AKh7I0HqySg4cyOsq8Fg1vfYTdcRJPv5DM-AYMmamtDH6eZNWfuhBAP_iZor9hGwVcK7yAeUVBW4nfWlrLmJHu8uQVyrgkWUxoiZeyqY5dTrIaXyqEsOY5bzA_0GjrMVyT28kazTieJZmi9QsvgygQmc4pNVwbpOrzv6ENRa6l_Cry1rX2q2wQuYap6pShGd4uu6VroDe0qyoz2fgmD3uKTW0Oy9gIiJYSVBihcdGkKkWOlCjAPmvXXGX6kFWexS0ZfhfzVb228eZ2-Ni7_PdLyiN0Hyi6SZNxmLPJZ4wdt9G8DsZHnwGUcO6jLP_bZwbtMVW7Apwmppk4-4NnA2cTva1_Rb1K4GkcYeJ_jsGs5rIKJyCX22n4oxmiJ7tGq-NUflIrpRIuqUnRdWFMbR4oJMsGdjqeIaWxhe1M%3D) To put it simply, we deserve better representation in Congress. We need a voice that reflects our values in CD-5 and a public servant who maintains a consistent focus on the issues we face every day and works earnestly to resolve those issues. I’m running for Congress so that our children and their children can grow up in a great and free country like I did. Join me, and let’s take back Oklahoma’s 5th Congressional District together, for our communities, our state, and the future of our country. [ **Join Team Hill TODAY!** ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=6a2741bc461443c38a12aed0a7f2925a&_e=9CY_1AKh7I0HqySg4cyOsq8Fg1vfYTdcRJPv5DM-AYMmamtDH6eZNWfuhBAP_iZo_uKdr9DWnm1kOyk0hSkam_n0s0qhdTSqUloBuGr5DErrofZrv2G7DbnYARx0pPGRt1xIVX91AWNkuk61mQrVy20uqa8ix2O3SisioYIDWKwZkTLwJxeO1XW95_ULiVf2OfpzxXJUopjJimv6BzIIKl-u_lc4rjZxTbodhRdCgY59Pp_2Ej2dWT363LzyG9wB5jJH4mF1oWEXmp_2wA5n_lXIGYngVv_xuWy6lkzBksZXYF31yl1OPBKjkxFubFt7To-wl4603cM9j2GlPXncYEyg4taAOIiwVsMcRwF5vscMcsS9hSujwd1YD8G8YfefOwa2OWUdcrUI8MK5NpAtmg%3D%3D) Rather than someone who stalls over wasteful investigations and follows Pelosi’s do-nothing agenda, we need a representative in Congress who will fight for us and with us to actually get things done. As a conservative, pro-Trump businessman, I will fight everyday in Congress to be your voice. I will work to accomplish goals that actually reflect our values, and I will make it a personal priority of mine to defend our nation from the threat of socialism. _**Let’s seize the opportunity to stop radical liberals in their tracks!**_ [ **SUPPORT OUR COUNTRY'S FUTURE!**

name: Jason Leviskas
subject: Oberweis for Congress: Weekend of Action Saturday March 14 & Sunday March 15 / Election Night information JOIN US
body:
**Oberweis for Congress: Weekend of Action Saturday March 14 & Sunday March 15 / Election Night information**

**
**
Greetings Friends and Supporters,

We need you for the final push this weekend!!

We have our final "Weekend of Action" before the primary election in **5 days**.
**Thousands** of doors have been hit, and we intend to keep pushing this weekend to hit more all over the district. If you can make it out to **_1 of our 8 walks_** we have organized, please let us know and reply to this email or to one of the field coordinators listed below who are walking with groups this weekend!
If walking your own precinct is more your speed, reply to this email with your precinct information and we can provide a walk list and supplies to walk your neighborhood.
We also will have Sign Crews going all over the district putting up Large and small signs. If you have a good location for us, please let us know by replying to this email.

News from Jim2020.com
## JIM OBERWEIS NEW AD RESPONDS TO DEMOCRAT’S RADICAL IMMIGRATION POLICIES OBERWEIS WARNED ABOUT CURRENT IMMIGRATION CRISIS
<https://jim2020.com/jim-oberweis-new-ad-responds-to-democrats-radical-immigration-policies-oberweis-warned-about-current-immigration-crisis/>

## Vote by Mail Information

<https://jim2020.com/vote-by-mail/>

Saturday March 14th
Kane Co Walk:
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy, Ste J St.Charles, IL) at **_12:30pm_** to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.
Contact Kane County Coordinator Debbie Kanarowski to RSVP @ [Debbie@jim2020.com](mailto:Debbie@jim2020.com).

Lake Co Walk:
Grassroots Coordinator Matt Duray will be coordinating walk activities. Almost all of Lake Co has been walked by Team Oberweis!!! This is the last weekend to finish it off. Contact Matt @ [Matthew@jim2020.com](mailto:Matthew@jim2020.com) to RSVP for walking and getting supplies if you would like to walk your local area.

Will Co Walk:
Will County Coordinator Raquel Mitchell will be coordinating walk activities. Contact Raquel @ [Raquel@jim2020.com](mailto:Raquel@jim2020.com) to RSVP for walking and getting supplies if you would like to walk your local area.

McHenry Co Walk:
McHenry Co Coordinator Robert Gibbons will be coordinating walk activities. Contact Robert @ [Robert@jim2020.com](mailto:Robert@jim2020.com) to RSVP for walking and getting supplies if you would like to walk your local area.

Sunday March 15th

Lake Co Walk:
Grassroots Coordinator Matt Duray coordinating walk activities. Almost all of Lake Co has been walked by Team Oberweis!!! This is the last weekend to finish it off. Contact Matt @ [Matthew@jim2020.com](mailto:Matthew@jim2020.com) to RSVP for walking and getting supplies if you would like to walk your local area.

Kane Co Walk:
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy, Ste J St.Charles, IL) at **_2:00pm_** to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.
Contact Kane County Coordinator Debbie Kanarowski to RSVP @ [Debbie@jim2020.com](mailto:Debbie@jim2020.com).

Will Co Walk:
Will County Coordinator Raquel Mitchell will be coordinati walk activities. Contact Raquel @ [Raquel@jim2020.com](mailto:Raquel@jim2020.com) to RSVP for walking and getting supplies if you would like to walk your local area.

McHenry Co Walk:
McHenry Co Coordinator Robert Gibbons will be coordinating walk activities. Contact Robert @ [Robert@jim2020.com](mailto:Robert@jim2020.com) to RSVP for walking and getting supplies if you would like to walk your local area.

Let us know if you can make it !

We look forward to seeing everyone this weekend,

#TEAM OBERWEIS / #WINwithJIM
Jason@JIM2020.com

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Coronavirus
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nc55n9ZYgB4_PzgMLdrxxDlQXKGnK4B-H98jWtuskbA=/PVdPeik_lszyehQjxZGQaClhEceHiZWbclHolNHV4Zk=)
---
| Friends, As you all know COVID-19, or Coronavirus, has reached the United States. There are now over 1,000 confirmed cases in the U.S., including more than 30 here in Texas, and the Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo has been canceled to ensure public safety. The single most important step we can all take to minimize the spread and impact of the virus is to be informed. Here's what you need to know:
* Typical symptoms of COVID-19 include fever, coughing, and shortness of breath. **If you or someone around you is experiencing these symptoms, contact a doctor immediately.**
* Wash your hands often, especially before eating or after coughing, sneezing, or blowing your nose. Hands should be washed for 20 seconds with soap. If soap is not available, use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer.
* Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth as much as possible, and wipe down "high-touch" surfaces frequently.
* **If you are sick, please stay home except to seek medical care. While you may not be at risk for serious infection, others around you -- including the elderly and those with pre-existing conditions -- could be at great risk.**
* If you are a resident of Harris County seeking healthcare or information, call 713-634-1110. If you are a resident of Fort Bend County, call 281-633-7795.

Unfortunately, the White House has failed to respond to this crisis with the concern and professionalism the American people deserve, from downplaying the number of cases to failing to prepare enough testing materials for the coming weeks. **This is a matter of public health, and now is not the moment for political games. That 's why I'm calling on President Trump to appoint a doctor or scientist -- NOT Vice President Pence -- to lead the government's response to COVID-19.** [**Will you sign my petition to join me in calling for a doctor or scientist to take charge?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nc55n9ZYgB4_PzgMLdrxxDlQXKGnK4B-H98jWtuskbA=/vFaAn0jpu_ozPsSvRu6H5MC0xetD_nkUuXKvyUbX_Gc=) | **[SIGN THE PETITION ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nc55n9ZYgB4_PzgMLdrxxDlQXKGnK4B-H98jWtuskbA=/2IOujCFBjBqSQGv-BzXQwbGOpSrYQMgPfXv9i365We4=)**
---
Thank you. I'll check in as soon as I have more information.
\-- Congressman Al Green
**[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nc55n9ZYgB4_PzgMLdrxxDlQXKGnK4B-H98jWtuskbA=/krKaYKE_zZ3AFzIJdBy9MZbF7eIuPsSibK66xBV0vZA=?refcode=E1748-20200312-Coronavirus-SB&amount=25)**
---
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Nc55n9ZYgB4_PzgMLdrxxDlQXKGnK4B-H98jWtuskbA=/99ssUA4-oiNNRLn_ujRx3YG4h-nePYeW4fnkLulZak0=) here.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Coronavirus Response Will Protect America’s Economy, Workers and Businesses
body:
"The president’s action plan should win bipartisan support to respond to the most serious health and humanitarian crisis our nation has faced..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5185559b7a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Coronavirus Response Will Protect America’s Economy, Workers and Businesses**

“Showing strong and effective leadership when we need it most, President Trump addressed the nation Wednesday night and unveiled a two-pronged program of health and economic actions to deal with the coronavirus pandemic,” Andy Puzder writes for Fox News.

“The president’s action plan should win bipartisan support to respond to the most serious health and humanitarian crisis our nation has faced in my nearly seven decades.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f372171f03&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH** : [President Trump’s address to the nation ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f727b4b63&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Vice President Mike Pence said yesterday that the Trump Administration is “working every single day to clear out any red tape to make [Coronavirus] tests more and more available. Right now, every state lab in America can conduct testing.” President Trump has also brought in leaders from America’s top commercial labs, including Quest and LabCorp, to work with the Administration, Joshua Nelson reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db4b62fc3d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Some 150,000 illegal immigrants from 72 nations with cases of the coronavirus have been apprehended or deemed inadmissible from entering the United States since November,” according to officials. These apprehensions underscore the need for border security and proper vetting. Read more from Paul Bedard in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0997bcfcb1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Big and bold, optimistic and compassionate. President Trump’s Oval Office address was exactly what America needed to hear. This is what it looks like when a president rises up to meet a crisis head-on,” Michael Goodwin writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65c89b6b53&e=3ee4985eea).

clean_body: "The president’s action plan should win bipartisan support to respond to the most serious health and humanitarian crisis our nation has faced..." | | | | | | | Trump Coronavirus Response Will Protect America’s Economy, Workers and Businesses “Showing strong and effective leadership when we need it most, President Trump addressed the nation Wednesday night and unveiled a two-pronged program of health and economic actions to deal with the coronavirus pandemic,” Andy Puzder writes for Fox News. “The president’s action plan should win bipartisan support to respond to the most serious health and humanitarian crisis our nation has faced in my nearly seven decades.” WATCH : | | Vice President Mike Pence said yesterday that the Trump Administration is “working every single day to clear out any red tape to make [Coronavirus] tests more and more available. Right now, every state lab in America can conduct testing.” President Trump has also brought in leaders from America’s top commercial labs, including Quest and LabCorp, to work with the Administration, Joshua Nelson reports for . | | “Some 150,000 illegal immigrants from 72 nations with cases of the coronavirus have been apprehended or deemed inadmissible from entering the United States since November,” according to officials. These apprehensions underscore the need for border security and proper vetting. Read more from Paul Bedard in the . | | “Big and bold, optimistic and compassionate. President Trump’s Oval Office address was exactly what America needed to hear. This is what it looks like when a president rises up to meet a crisis head-on,” Michael Goodwin writes in the . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Charles Booker
subject: I’m outraged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We need change — our lives literally depend on it.
#
The coronavirus outbreak has reached a critical turning point.
Schools are suspending classes, offices are closing, groceries stores are selling out of basic supplies, and new cases are spreading faster than our country is prepared to handle. Americans are counting on our leaders to get us through this moment of crisis.
**Instead, we learned earlier today that Mitch McConnell plans to block the Coronavirus Response Bill and possibly wants to wait a few more weeks to consider taking any action. **
[**We need change — our lives literally depend on it. Will you chip in $5 to help fund the campaign with the strongest chance at defeating Mitch and transforming our dysfunctional Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16016158/169639701/-1367929999?refcode=em20200312&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTQ0MzhkNy1hMjY0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAKVtqQsCcC80DbKVfOYc67HromqgVOAhCOZykxfe7U=)
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16016159/169639702/-1367929999?refcode=em20200312&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTQ0MzhkNy1hMjY0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAKVtqQsCcC80DbKVfOYc67HromqgVOAhCOZykxfe7U=)**
Mitch refusing to vote for this bill is a solemn reminder why he’s got to go this November.
Public health officials have already made it clear that if we don’t take serious action now, our country will pay in the next coming months. To know that under Mitch’s leadership, Republicans want to wait until after recess ends on March 23rd to do anything is infuriating.
He has no interest in helping Americans stay alive and financially secure — and it’s definitely not the first time he’s failed to do the right thing, even when the moment begged for it.
For years he’s voted to slash Medicare, vowed to block universal health care solutions like Medicare for All, and now when our country is faced with a pandemic he still refuses to do the bare minimum.
**I’m outraged.** It’s a solemn reminder why Mitch has got to go and why we’re fighting so hard to elect a new wave of leadership to D.C. [**Will you chip in $5 to replace Mitch with a leader who’s committed to protecting the health & well-being of Americans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16016160/169639703/-1367929999?refcode=em20200312&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTQ0MzhkNy1hMjY0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aAKVtqQsCcC80DbKVfOYc67HromqgVOAhCOZykxfe7U=)
Fighting for you,
Charles Booker

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Help Mark protect members of the military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Tell Congress: Don't let Trump use critical military funding for his border wall.
|
---
| | | Tell Congress:
Don't let Trump use critical military funding for his border wall.
[Sign the petition >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d587/53d9897e/5331d83b/1c8994b7/676271984/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-military")
---

Derek --

Last week, Mark introduced the Restoring Military Priorities Act with Tim Kaine and 30 of their Senate colleagues. **This important bill would restore $3.8 billion in military funding to crucial defense projects in Virginia and across our nation -- funding that the Trump administration is trying to divert to pay for their border wall.

[Will you join Mark in demanding that Congress restore critical military funding?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d587/53d9897e/5331d83b/1c8994b7/676271984/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-military")**

This was the third time in under a year that the Trump administration recklessly diverted money from Pentagon priorities to fund the ineffective wall. This is just plain irresponsible -- and it puts our men and women in uniform at risk.

**Here 's the breakdown: The administration is taking away $77 million from Virginia alone.**
* The Cyber Operations Facility at Joint Base Langley-Eustis will lose **$10 million.**
* The Navy Ships Maintenance Facility in Portsmouth will lose just over **$26 million.**
* Projects to replace hazardous materials warehouses in Norfolk and Portsmouth will lose a total of **$41 million.**

**We should be supporting our national security interests -- not the president's pet project.**

The Restoring Military Priorities Act would return $3.8 billion in funding to actual national security priorities and prevent President Trump from using any additional Department of Defense funds to build his border wall.

**[Will you join Mark in fighting to make sure that the brave people who serve their country have the resources they need to carry out their duties?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d587/53d9897e/5331d83b/1c8994b7/676271984/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-military")**

Thank you,

Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d587/53d9897e/5331d83b/1c8994b6/676271984/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-militarygen?refcode=20200312_p_1_fl__509__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d587/53d9897e/5331d83b/1c8994b5/676271984/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Corky Messner
subject: Jeanne Shaheen’s DESPERATE plea
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
She IS vulnerable, and we have her on the run! Tap or click to learn more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e82ab8a867c75be2/7d0fd97c2358b26ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Did you see this?

Jeanne Shaheen has sent out a DESPERATE plea to her supporters. She’s even letting them know that she’s “one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators on the ballot this year.”

_**Well, she’s right**_. The only part she left out is why...

She’s vulnerable because she DOES NOT represent our Granite State values, and because I’m giving her the political fight of her life! [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/e82ab8a867c75be2/302aaae9c0b2698fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) I’m proud to have put another $2 million of my own savings into this race. I did so because I believe this race is that important, and because I know the good that I can do for our state.

_**And with Jeanne Shaheen sitting on a $5.7 MILLION campaign war chest, it’s vital that we have the resources we need to compete and WIN!**_

Jeanne Shaheen isn’t vulnerable because of my investments in this race. She’s vulnerable because her radical-left agenda is WRONG and we’re exposing her true colors.

She’s certainly no “moderate” as she’d love to have Granite Staters believe!

Peter, there is no doubt the pressure is on Republicans to win in 2020. _We HAVE to win back the house this November. It’s the number one thing._

**That’s why I’m announcing my support for a strong, proven conservative: Claudia Tenney in NY-22.**

**[Will you chip in today to help Claudia and take back the house?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=08f76350f24941fb9197b1c8ce707bdf&_e=BFvSgSVLtaeBPe48PRalcdOoipFMx_u0gkG0n1UzA7jxyq-FkqQo4wBxbx6cQyTlaCgULKbmfoEjJ3-fP2S3_RKEJeCP1QLLyH7hsQD6ue882Sh8XbA0rNvvU0fBgSPKfGnLkdZYL-5ddgg95WCScuzTWBc-HumT86rYMTWjNhk9QZKrtxPgMxn8aSwRMh-GGJ-G87tYsZD6yNR7sok6C5UjHMXUXpf365wqT9tdz9os3mgob-bKH1IksgmOVgYeISKFmYq4YlokcSgE5FGhdzFHQBuDeTvAWI0SuhrS4Z1BCO5Y4cb7-SJHCfxMN6nqSB7dqujSj38qqUj2Npuq-pYrHIfNlmnObG2_ySzk6B3GtIM4PFHm5AJeodlDdjePZFHfgyd4XttFjLZmtt9fVRdiKM_PBs8VLTtkZe4Rc6DSvHEAczjJO9REU_Q6-ihmdhpfRQDPpP0Jr4ohzFbn9zWUartwpZgSoPD-6MaPuRY%3D)**

Peter – under this liberal majority, the House Democrats have made a mockery of our oath and duty to the Constitution in such a partisan fashion, and they have been very cavalier about doing so.

It’s an insult to our people and to our principles.

The House should be a place of action, like it was when I served with Claudia in the last session in Congress. **Together, we passed historic tax reform, ensured care for our veterans, and defended small business. And I KNOW there’s more work to be done.**

**[GET CLAUDIA BACK TO CONGRESS>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=08f76350f24941fb9197b1c8ce707bdf&_e=BFvSgSVLtaeBPe48PRalcdOoipFMx_u0gkG0n1UzA7jxyq-FkqQo4wBxbx6cQyTlaCgULKbmfoEjJ3-fP2S3_RKEJeCP1QLLyH7hsQD6ue882Sh8XbA0rNvvU0fBgSPKfGnLkdZYL-5ddgg95WCScuzTWBc-HumT86rYMTWjNhk9QZKrtxPgMxn8aSwRMh-GGJ-G87tYsZD6yNR7sok6C5UjHMXUXpf365wqT9tdz9os3mgob-bKH1IksgmOVgYeISKFmYq4YlokcSgE5FGhd91H6fwTY3gW_uqSHidqOH88C4owYd3wGgtuHnPOcqgQ4LOvvCF_IMHC4YyoAfRMkQEC3-KRnZEveAXN4Jx1YWnLE8CCSzirC3qdvi-ePweJv-StwRyMy18mp9h8Py6jcqCaF0HTBk9bYISHlj8DtW1ZPEYSu_qGNDy2K4z9W6XPDIgLUHNvQfibwbQSthTJe230sbcn0VXLmKHrTnWoMTY%3D)**

The House Democrats AREN'T focused on hard work. For them, it’s all about partisan hype. Look at the Green New Deal, for example. It’s a socialist fantasy and totally dangerous.

_And every week they seem to come up with a new low._

Without a strong conservative majority, they’re just going to continue this slow side into dangerous, socialist policies.

**We NEED representatives like Claudia Tenney to stand for our conservative values and protect the integrity of our nation.**

**[I hope you’ll join me to support Claudia today by making a contribution:](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=08f76350f24941fb9197b1c8ce707bdf&_e=BFvSgSVLtaeBPe48PRalcdOoipFMx_u0gkG0n1UzA7jxyq-FkqQo4wBxbx6cQyTlaCgULKbmfoEjJ3-fP2S3_RKEJeCP1QLLyH7hsQD6ue882Sh8XbA0rNvvU0fBgSPKfGnLkdZYL-5ddgg95WCScuzTWBc-HumT86rYMTWjNhk9QZKrtxPgMxn8aSwRMh-GGJ-G87tYsZD6yNR7sok6C5UjHMXUXpf365wqT9tdz9os3mgob-bKH1IksgmOVgYeISKFmYq4YlokcSgE5FGhdzJQgFaawiDkvW2zpPqTNBA53M960gSu9McTBpV6LKWlxa6nwe83XXWW_Kr1ZP3FWkzsom_o6JUjoLTiyaVyUlnauQglmG3WRnay5xs5rqrGLeHsQ12mtH3FMAcudxNbZ4AjPgGaIc5D-jDv6JWM6bhUbzWheNPZVVI3VWFVNxr-Lcxg4hjCMQlV0BFyBRcQ-PYpGkAADZoO49_c_lJjQKs%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Indiana Republican State Convention
body:
I hate to address every rumor that gets put out on the internet, but one circulating today about the Republican State Convention goes to the heart... |
---
| |
---
| Indiana Republicans,

I hate to address every rumor that gets put out on the internet, but one circulating today about the Republican State Convention goes to the heart of our Party functions. As Chairman, I need to set the record straight: There are no plans to cancel state convention.

I wanted to make sure that Republicans across the state, and especially our convention delegates, have the facts about informal discussions that have taken place among members of our state committee.

Like most other large organizations that have upcoming events that will attract robust crowds, the Indiana Republican Party needs to be prepared with possible contingency plans if our planned state convention in June is impacted by the coronavirus. We do not anticipate the same sort of crowd control precautions taking place today in relation to sporting events to still be necessary in June. However, the responsible course of action is to be prepared, just in case.

To that end, this morning, I had a call with members of the state committee to begin discussing what contingencies could look like if we are, indeed, impacted. While there is much uncertainty as we start these discussions, there is consensus and clarity that our first priority is to proceed with the convention as planned. In the event that is not an option, our second priority is to seek an option that includes input from our delegates as our general election nominees are selected. As we get closer to the convention we will ensure that we keep everyone well informed.

Thank you for all you do for the Republican Party.

-Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---

name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: Now is the time to plan, prepare, and prevent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Friends --

As many of you know, the World Health Organization recently announced that the coronavirus, also called COVID-19, has reached pandemic levels. This means that the disease has spread to many countries across the world, including several thousand confirmed cases in the United States.

Right now, the State of Kansas has five confirmed cases of COVID-19 in Johnson County, but I can assure you that all city, county, and state officials are working diligently to prepare our communities various scenarios. Many organizations have cancelled large events including conferences, parades, sports tournaments, and other social gatherings. Our colleges and universities are also extending spring break for its students and preparing to conduct online classes for the remainder of the semester.

Please know that each of these steps are being taken in an abundance of caution and with the health and safety of all our citizens in mind.

Here are some additional tips to keep you and your family healthy, and to prevent the spread of flu, COVID-19, and other illnesses:
* Practice frequent handwashing with soap and water for at least 20 seconds.
* Use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer if soap and water are not available.
* Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth.
* Cover your mouth and nose with a tissue when you cough or sneeze. If you do not have a tissue, cough or sneeze into your elbow or upper sleeve.
* Clean all frequently touched objects and surfaces in the workplace, such as workstations, countertops, and doorknobs, using a regular household cleaning spray or wipe.
* If you are immune compromised, please stay home and limit social contact.
* Practice social distancing, such as avoiding crowds, shaking hands, and hugging friends.

The known symptoms of COVID-19 include cough, fever in excess of 100 degrees, and shortness of breath. If you are experiencing these symptoms, please call the doctor or hospital before you go so that everyone can take proper precautions while taking the best care of you.

Finally, if you own or manage a business, please take some time to talk to your employees about your plans and what steps you will take if an employee or customer is symptomatic, if local schools or daycares close temporarily, or if it is necessary to close the business and work remotely for a short time.

Let us choose the path of understanding and compassion during this challenging time for our communities and economy. This is not the time to panic. Rather, now is the time to plan, prepare, and prevent. We will all get through this together.

Thank you,

Michelle

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas
PO Box 67101
Topeka, KS 66667

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/306f278a-b664-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd/4803d39b-be64-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODAzZDM5Yi1iZTY0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8lvIvg5XF6NX3N7pZ-hQ_GH1lkhFt3JDez7XLQal7TQ=&id=111940568&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Roseanne Barr "Co-Signs" for Laura Loomer
body:
Last night, I live streamed with Roseanne Barr. Roseanne is an amazing friend who shares our values and has taken a strong stance against Big Tech censorship.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367735-862875-4907841-b8e7fcabf9-c5a6a7a468)
Patriot,

Last night, I live streamed with Roseanne Barr.

Roseanne is an amazing friend who shares our values and has taken a strong stance against Big Tech censorship.

On the outset of the show, I believe I received the best endorsement a candidate can receive when Roseanne Barr said, **“I’m co-signing for you or whatever you call it.”**

We had some audio issues for the first ten minutes of the show, but stick with it as Roseanne is priceless.

After you watch, [**please don’t forget to fund our drive to raise the $10,440**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367735-862875-4907840-0fb0b0d4d5-c5a6a7a468) we need to get on the ballot.

If you didn’t catch my message earlier this week, for the health of the community, I canceled our petition drive to get on the ballot due to Coronavirus concerns.

If you haven’t already, [**please donate here to get me on the ballot**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367735-862875-4907840-0fb0b0d4d5-c5a6a7a468).

Here’s the video, [**please watch it as soon as you can**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367735-862875-4907840-0fb0b0d4d5-c5a6a7a468).

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367735-862875-4907840-0fb0b0d4d5-c5a6a7a468)
I know many of you are focused on the Coronavirus at the moment. Roseanne Barr said she is too. But she was gracious enough during the live stream to offer to make her first-ever trip to Palm Beach, Florida to have an event in support of my congressional campaign when the coronavirus pandemic ends.

Roseanne Barr also called on President Trump to support my campaign. After all, he is a resident of my district.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer
Co-Signed by Roseanne Barr!

As the Court decides on crucial cases in the coming weeks, we need your help to flex our muscles and show strong support behind Justice Roberts, Kavanaugh, Gorsuch, Alito, and Thomas. Peter, let’s rebuke Cryin’ Chuck Schumer and the radical Democrat Party that is trying to overthrow the rule of law in America. For freedom, Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress Pennsylvania’s 7th District Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Gary Peters
subject: re: Betsy DeVos and her family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
-
| | | |
---
Hey friend, there are few issues more personal to me than education. My dad Herb taught in Michigan schools for 32 years, and through him, I saw directly the impact that strong public education can have. Those are the values that I've carried with me throughout my entire life.

Just the other day, I learned that Betsy DeVos' family is dumping $800,000 in Michigan to defeat me, all because I'm fighting tooth and nail in the Senate for students. **And, to be quite honest, if Betsy DeVos ' family is scared of me, I must be doing something right. **

But their attacks are loud, and they aren't going away. That's why it's so important we fight back for students. So I'm reaching out one last time before my petition closes at midnight. We're really hoping to hear from another 30 folks: **[Will you add your name to fight for an education secretary who stands up for our students? ](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk326-ja-in-nd")**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk326-ja-in-nd")
---
Thank you for standing up for students.

Gary
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: G. Peters
Subject: This is an abuse of taxpayer dollars
| | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da8ce/5721a3ed/7f2bb301/efb37bb/2233450499/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend,

I grew up going to Michigan's public schools. And as the son of a hardworking public school teacher, I know just how important education is. That's why I've been so troubled with Betsy Devos' job as secretary of education.

Since becoming our country's education secretary, Betsy DeVos has done nothing but cater to wealthy interests, putting greedy corporations above our students and teachers.
**She 's even drained over half a BILLION dollars of taxpayer money into sham charter schools that closed or never opened - many of which were right here in Michigan.**
DeVos is abusing our taxpayer money, and we urgently need to hold her accountable. That's why I need another 871 supporters like you to stand with me against Betsy DeVos' misconduct - **so join me in calling for an education secretary who actually puts our students first. **
**[Friend, if you care about the quality of our students' education, add your name now to denounce Betsy DeVos and demand a better education secretary for our students.](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk326-ja-in-nd")**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk326-ja-in-nd")
---
Michigan's students need a leader who will advocate for their success - and Betsy DeVos is robbing them of their chances at a world-class education. Thank you so much, friend, for standing with me for what's right.
Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da8ce/5721a3ed/7f2bb301/efb37ba/2233450499/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da8ce/5721a3ed/7f2bb301/efb37b9/2233450499/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da8ce/5721a3ed/7f2bb301/efb37b8/2233450499/VEsO/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I owe you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to add a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate before our mid-month deadline on Sunday. But first, I owe you an explanation. I'm not your typical politician. Back in the mid-1980s, I was laid off for 27 months as a geologist. Then, I mustered every scrap of savings in my bank account and took a gamble on opening my own business, a brewpub in downtown Denver (our flagship brew was the Light Rail Ale). **After realizing our government didn 't work for everyday folks like me, I ran for mayor and eventually governor. We created jobs here in Colorado and brought people from all walks of life together to get things done that mattered.** But now, Republican Senator Cory Gardner is failing Colorado. He won't stand up to his party bosses and votes in lockstep with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell. **It 's time we replace him with the leadership Colorado deserves.** You see, my opponent is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country, but he's also backed by Mitch McConnell's network of right-wing billionaire donors who will do everything they can to tear us down. **Can I count on you to donate $10, or whatever you can, toward our mid-month goal on Sunday? Every dollar you give helps us build a winning campaign to flip Colorado blue.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200312-lme?refcode=em-200312-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Tina Smith
subject: Pesky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — I know messages like these can be a bit pesky sometimes, but they make a huge difference for our team. Give me a moment to explain why. Every survey you fill out allows us to build a campaign around our shared values. Every petition you sign sends a powerful message. And most importantly, every dollar you give helps our team make sure we have the resources to win re-election and keep Minnesota blue this November. But according to my finance and digital staffers, we’re coming up short on our goals ahead of the first FEC deadline of the year. That's a serious problem for our campaign — especially with President Trump targeting Minnesota and dumping resources into our state. And the truth is, my opponent can count on Mitch McConnell’s network of right-wing mega-donors and super PACs to win, but I refuse to play that game. I want to win the right way. So, if we're going to hold our own in the final weeks before the first (and arguably most important) FEC deadline of this critical election year, we need to catch up on our goals — quickly. And if we're going to do that it's going to come from messages like these, because I am never going to beg special interests to cut me a big check. So, here’s where I ask you: **Do you think you could add a contribution of $10 or more right now as part of our push to get our grassroots fundraising back on track before our first FEC deadline of the year? So, here’s where I ask you: Do you think you could add a contribution of $10 or more right now as part of our push to get our grassroots fundraising back on track before our first FEC deadline of the year? I need your help more than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for everything you do for our campaign. A lot of candidates out there wish they had supporters like you they could count on in moments like these. I know how lucky I am to have you on my team. Thanks again, Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump is taking unprecedented action to protect Americans
body:
Last night, President Trump spoke to the nation about the Federal Government’s plans to prevent, detect, treat, and help create a vaccine to fight... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=929185f00b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 12, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump is taking unprecedented action to protect Americans**

**Last night, President Trump** spoke to the nation about the Federal Government’s plans to prevent, detect, treat, and help create a vaccine to fight the global Coronavirus.

🇺🇸 **Watch:** [America’s team is the best in the world](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ced2972d3&e=3ee4985eea)

**“This is the most aggressive** and comprehensive effort to confront a foreign virus in modern history,” the President said. “We will significantly reduce the threat to our citizens, and we will ultimately and expeditiously defeat this virus.”

**The President** is leading a whole-of-government response, including:

* **Further action to curb the spread** of Coronavirus to the United States from other countries: The President is issuing a proclamation to restrict travel to America from foreign nationals who have recently been in certain European countries. The restriction applies to those who have been in the Schengen Area, 26 countries in Europe with open-borders agreements, in the last 14 days.

* **Protection for American businesses and workers:** President Trump is announcing an economic assistance package to help businesses and workers harmed by the outbreak. He also instructed the Small Business Administration to provide loans to businesses affected by the virus, and instructed the Treasury Department to defer tax payments for individuals and businesses that have been severely impacted.

* **Early preventative measures:** The Trump Administration declared a public health emergency in January to bolster response efforts. That month, the President also acted quickly to restrict travel from foreign nationals arriving from China, and in February, he extended such restrictions to include Iran.

* **Full support for on-the-ground responders:** Last week, President Trump signed into law more than $8 billion to fund response efforts. Working across the public and private sectors, the Administration has taken bold steps to incentivize the development of therapeutics and vaccines, and it continues to drastically expand testing capacity. More than 1 million tests have been distributed nationwide, with another 4 million being shipped out by the end of the week.

[What you need to know: President Trump’s unprecedented public safety actions](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=72f8994e22&e=3ee4985eea)

**Stay prepared:** [Follow the CDC’s latest recommendations](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a45fdb71ac&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Watch: President Trump welcomes leader of Ireland ahead of St. Patrick’s Day**

**Taoiseach of Ireland Leo Varadkar** met with President Trump today, where the two leaders honored the upcoming St. Patrick’s Day holiday and discussed the strengthening relationship between America and Ireland.

**St. Patrick’s Day** is “a symbol of how close Ireland and America are and how we’re going to continue to stay close into the future,” Prime Minister Varadkar said. Addressing the Coronavirus threat, he reflected on the Administration’s response. “I was with the Vice President this morning, who I know is heading up the task force for you, and he gave me a lot of confidence that you’re getting on top of this and you’re investing in this.”

☘ **Watch:** [President Trump welcome’s Ireland’s leader to the White House!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25a8d580c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **A bowl of Irish shamrocks was presented to President Trump in the Oval Office during his meeting with Irish Prime Minister Leo Varadkar** | March 12, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fa5911126&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f6faaea85a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3321c92f36)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
